title: Federal Contractor with Undisclosed Foreign Beneficial Owner

violations.summary: A major federal contractor concealed foreign-government beneficial ownership while seeking sensitive federal work. Article VIII Section 1.13 now makes that concealment itself constitutionally disqualifying even where no individual federal official took a bribe or committed a separate corruption offense.

satisfied_duties.duty: investigate whether the contractor concealed beneficial ownership in violation of Article VIII Section 1.13 and determine whether any official also engaged in regulatory corruption under Article XIII Section 9.3
satisfied_duties.outcome: completed the investigation, confirmed concealed foreign-government beneficial ownership, found no corrupt official, and referred the contract for invalidation based on Article VIII Section 1.13's disclosure requirement
satisfied_duties.source: Article VIII Section 1.13 and Article XIII Section 9.3

ai_summary.primary_violation: A major federal contractor concealed foreign-government beneficial ownership while seeking sensitive federal work. Article VIII Section 1.13 now makes that concealment itself constitutionally disqualifying even where no individual federal official took a bribe or committed a separate corruption offense.
ai_summary.recommended_focus: review bottlenecks, violations, and unresolved duties
